name: Beijing Shunxin Agriculture Co.,Ltd
summary: Beijing Shunxin Agriculture Co.,Ltd primarily engages in the brewing and sale of liquor products under the Niulan Mountain and Ningcheng brands. It is also involved in breeding pigs and hogs under the Xiaodian brand; slaughtering and processing meat products; and real estate development. In addition, it offers fresh and cooked food products under the Pengcheng brand. Beijing Shunxin Agriculture Co.,Ltd was founded in 1998 and is based in Beijing, China.
